steps.title: Connect motive to action
steps.content: Rivera-Santos wanted to avoid harsh synthetic dyes that could harm the environment. The next sentence describes the action she took because of that goal: experimenting with natural dye methods.

steps.title: Choose a purpose transition
steps.content: Choice B signals a summary, but the second sentence is not summarizing. Choice C signals contrast, though the action follows from the goal. Choice D signals correction or actuality, which is not the relationship here. The answer is A.
